caption: A man with a tall, spiky, grey wig, glasses, and headphones is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed photographs. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bowtie. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous small, square-framed pictures, and a "LEE" brand clothing item is partially visible. On-screen graphics include the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo, featuring a microphone icon. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his head shifting slightly. His expression remains relatively consistent as he addresses the microphone, while the background and equipment remain stationary throughout the scene.
